item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 30 Jun 2026
item.description:
1. New release of Sek
  2. Js_of_ocaml / Wasm_of_ocaml 6.4
  3. Ocsipersist 2.1.0: type-safe persistent references with Deriving
  4. Modular explicits in pre-OCaml 5.5
  5. LRgrep 0.9: Better syntax errors for OCaml and Menhir
  6. Static Analysis for OCaml
  7. new releases: Merlin 5.8 and OCaml-LSP 1.27.0 with support for OCaml 5.5
  8. duras 2.1.1 — daily notes as plain text files
  9. Software Engineer at LexiFi (Paris)
  10. Owebview : OCaml binding to the webview library
  11. OCaml Runtime Meeting: Mon, July 6 @ 10:00 UTC (10:00 London/Cambridge, 11:00 Paris, 7pm Sydney)
